examples: As a mountain, 1,642-foot Squaw Peak isn't that impressive.
Five hours after the woman in pink had fallen, Grant was back on top of Squaw Peak.
Her private opinion was that the redskins should not call her a squaw.
Smelling a bargain, resorts from Mount Hood Meadows to California's Squaw Valley awaited the auction.
Skiing at Squaw can run as late as Memorial Day if the snow cooperates.
